entries.title: La buena vida
entries.body: Desde la vida bella hacia la buena vida

entries.title: Prueba de citas enriquecidas.
entries.body:
> For me, the highlight was a visit to Narbo Via. This is a museum on the edge of town, sited rather incongruously beside a conference centre and a giant Carrefour supermarket
> -- [Narbo Martius: a Shady Charac­ters field trip](https://shadycharacters.co.uk/2023/07/narbo-martius-field-trip/)

Con un comentario sobre la buena vida.
